name: staticforge-engine
description: StaticForge Engine — schema-driven static site generation monorepo.

scripts.typecheck: echo "No packages to typecheck yet" && exit 0
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm generate && corepack pnpm --filter @staticforge/generator typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @staticforge/web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @staticforge/web build
